# OMC psm

`/oh-my-claudecode:psm` is a compatibility alias for `/oh-my-claudecode:project-session-manager`.
## Dispatch

1. Read the full generated Copilot skill instructions from
   `${PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills-copilot/project-session-manager/SKILL.md`.
2. Follow that file exactly and treat the user's arguments as:

```text
$ARGUMENTS
```

If `${PLUGIN_ROOT}` is unavailable, locate the active installed OMC plugin
root and continue from its `skills-copilot/project-session-manager/SKILL.md` file.
